# VFS Jewels

> Handcrafted premium 18K gold-plated, anti-tarnish imitation jewellery store based in Sowcarpet, Chennai.

## Core Offerings
- **Rings:** Celestial Halo, Infinity Bands, and statement rings.
- **Earrings:** CZ solitaire studs, drop earrings, and hoops.
- **Necklaces:** Eternal love pendants, pearl chains, and mangalsutras.
- **Bracelets:** Twisted rope designs, link charms, and tennis cuffs.

## Store Details
- **Location:** 42, 2nd Floor, Natwar Kurpa Complex, Narayana Mudali Street, Sowcarpet, George Town, Chennai - 600001
- **Contact:** WhatsApp/Phone +91 98407 57363 | Email: vfsjewels@gmail.com
- **Shipping:** Pan-India express delivery (₹90 flat fee).
- **Features:** Anti-Tarnish shield protective coating, lead-free, nickel-free brass alloy, premium ribbon gift packaging.

## URL Index
- [Storefront Homepage](https://vfsjewels.store/) - Browse catalog and place orders.
- [Sitemap](https://vfsjewels.store/sitemap.xml) - Full crawl index of storefront resources.
